NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT — MULTI-PARTY

This Non-Disclosure Agreement (the "NDA") is entered into among:
- Lotus Innovations Pte. Ltd. (UEN 200811223X), the "Company";
- Dr Siti Aishah binti Abdullah (NRIC S3344556B), the "Consultant";
- Mr Tan Wei Ming (NRIC S7788990C), the "Advisor"; and
- Ms Ramasamy Lakshmi (NRIC S1122334D), the "Auditor".

The Consultant shall not disclose confidential terms of Project Mahkota,
including the proposed acquisition of Bukit Industries Pte. Ltd. for $850 million.

Contact: siti.aishah@lotus.sg, +65 9123 4567.
